---
name: "🚀 Feature Request / Plugin Idea"
about: Suggest a new image format, storage transport protocol, or logging engine.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "plugin-idea"]
---

## 🎯 Functional Domain / Category
*Please select the target layer category for this extension:*
*   [ ] `formats/` (e.g., raw, qcow2, vmdk, vhdx, iso)
*   [ ] `storage/` (e.g., nfs, smb, sftp, usb)
*   [ ] `log/` (e.g., file, syslog, journald)
*   [ ] `report/` (e.g., html, pdf, forensic, json, csv)
*   [ ] `commands/` (New structural CLI subcommand hooks)

## 💡 The Core Concept
*Describe the feature or expansion idea clearly. What real-world virtualization or migration issue does this solve?*

## 🛠️ Binary & Architectural Implementation Ideas
*   **What external Linux binaries or Python libraries are required?** (For the `is_supported()` check)
*   **What should the default configuration keys look like inside xva-tool.conf.example?**
*   **How should the Text User Interface render this option?**

## 🌍 Benefit for the Community
*Why is this a valuable addition for other system administrators handling XVA/OVA images?*
